title: KB Project Graph
description: Schema for per-project graph.json produced by kb-engineer. Nodes and edges describe the project's conceptual topology: modules, services, datastores, and their relationships.

version.description: Schema version for graph.json. Bump when node/edge shape changes in an incompatible way.

project.description: Project name as resolved by kb-identity.

id.description: Stable node identifier, unique within this graph.

kb_doc.description: Relative path to this node's markdown doc. For service/module nodes: inside the KB project folder. For datastore nodes: either `datastores/<name>.md` (vault-level shared, relative from KB vault root) or `projects/<project>/datastores/<name>.md`. Required for service, module, and datastore nodes.

scope.description: Required on datastore nodes. `shared` means the datastore lives at vault-level `datastores/<name>.md` and is consumed by ≥2 services (optionally across ≥1 project) or is infrastructure-kind (kafka/rabbitmq/etc). `project` means a micro datastore owned by one project and referenced from a single consumer, located at `projects/<project>/datastores/<name>.md`.

discovery_sources.description: Which detection source(s) surfaced this node. Applies to services and datastores.

protocol.description: Primary protocol (e.g. http, grpc, tcp, amqp, kafka).
